name: Chart Grid
description: Grid of chart cards for dashboard data visualization

dashboard.description: 2x2 grid of chart cards, each with a title, chart placeholder area, and legend

slots.chart-card: Repeated Card wrapping a chart placeholder area
slots.chart-area: Placeholder div with min-height and data-chart-type attribute
slots.legend: Simple legend row below chart area

wide.description: Single row of charts, side-scrollable on mobile

slots.chart-card: Horizontally scrollable Card with chart placeholder
slots.chart-area: Placeholder div with min-height and data-chart-type attribute

mixed.description: Asymmetric layout: one large chart spanning 2 cols + two smaller charts

slots.primary-chart: Large chart Card spanning 2 columns with data-chart-type
slots.secondary-charts: Two smaller chart Cards in the second row

slots.chart-card: Repeated Card wrapping a chart placeholder area
slots.chart-area: Placeholder div with min-height and data-chart-type attribute
slots.legend: Simple legend row below chart area
